posts.text:
If $hg $hgraf goes green today we will have the shorts trapped like rats.  

There is no doubt in my mind that solely due to the recent rise these criminals who engage in straight up easily probable fraud shorted the stock aggressively yesterday. 

Their game plan is to pick stocks that have spiked and wait for them to appear over bought technically.  They then pound the stock to paint a negative candle pattern and try to trigger technical profit taking.  

Then they engage in spreading lies and committing securities fraud. Using fake account and bots to amplify.  

They typically see to only wait a few days at most and cover before the stock technicals stabilize and it risks moving higher. 

These people are seriously stupid because there’s so much upside here and potential for explosive news releases at anytime.  

I sure hope they get squeezed into a new universe of pain
posts.author: BambroughKevin
